currentCue.name: Door knock SFX
currentCue.memo: Wait for actor to fully turn before GO.

nextCue.name: Blackout transition
nextCue.memo: Prepare for fast transition. Confirm actor exits SR.

warnings: QLab next cue A13 and MA2 next cue 24 are intended to fire together.
Confirm actor is fully clear before pressing GO.

riskIndicators.label: Blackout
riskIndicators.message: Next transition removes all stage light.

riskIndicators.label: Sound timing
riskIndicators.message: Door knock must follow actor head turn.

riskIndicators.label: Automation
riskIndicators.message: Scene change starts projector shutter macro.

upcomingLighting.label: Corridor special
upcomingLighting.notes: Bring up SR special after actor crosses.

watchdog.label: Rain ambience should not be running after Scene 2
Door knock one-shot should stop within 5 seconds
Projector shutter macro should finish before blackout

recovery.title: Recover Scene 3 Interior
steps: Stop rain ambience if still active.
Set QLab selected cue to A13.
Set MA2 executor Main to Cue 23 active and Cue 24 next.
Confirm actor SR position before continuing.
